alkylation reagent: alkylated (55 mM iodoacetamide for 1h in the dark)
alkylation concentration: alkylated (55 mM iodoacetamide for 1h in the dark)
cleavage agent: digestion was performed by adding trypsin (Promega; 20μl of 0.1 mg/ml in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate)
fragmentation method: the 10 most abundant peptides were subjected to HCD fragmentation
instrument: All samples were analyzed on an Orbitrap Q-Exactive mass spectrometer.
